# Vysi

> Vysi is a platform of urban experiences. It turns a city into a living story through
> location-based narrative adventures you play on your phone, walking the real streets.
> The first adventures are set in Valenza Po (Piemonte, Italy). Tagline:
> "Valenza, quello che non avevi notato." ("Valenza, what you hadn't noticed.")

How it works: you receive a mysterious message, follow clues through the streets of the
city, and solve the enigma before the story ends. Your phone's GPS unlocks each location
as you reach it — there is nothing to install beyond opening the web app. Adventures are
free, take about 45 minutes, and are available in Italian (primary), English, and Spanish.

Vysi is an experience, not a typical app: it is warm, curious, and made for the curious
explorer — not a children's game and not a dry tourism guide.

## Public pages

- [Home](/): The story hook and an invitation to start the first investigation.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How player data is handled (GDPR-compliant; EU-hosted; no tracking or advertising cookies).
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms for using the Vysi experience.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Vysi is accessed through a mobile web browser; there is no app-store download.
- To play, a visitor opens the home page and starts an adventure, granting location access when prompted.
- Content is region-specific (currently Valenza, Italy) and expands city by city.
